is a [motorcycle rally](/wiki/Motorcycle_rally "Motorcycle rally") held annually each September since 1981 in [Anacortes, Washington](/wiki/Anacortes,_Washington "Anacortes, Washington"). It is the largest rally in the [Pacific Northwest](/wiki/Pacific_Northwest "Pacific Northwest")[[3]](#cite_note-3) with 2006 attendance estimated in the tens of thousands.[[4]](#cite_note-bikernet-4)

Marta Murvosh (September 29, 2008), ["27th Oyster Run draws thousands"](http://www.goskagit.com/news/th-oyster-run-draws-thousands/article_20cf29f8-6378-52a1-8797-ab41e3af15f2.html), *goskagit.com*, Skagit Valley Herald, retrieved 2010-01-07

[*Bikers overtake town in ritual Oyster Run*](https://www.seattlepi.com/news/article/bikers-overtake-town-in-ritual-oyster-run-1097301.php), [Seattle Post-Intelligencer](/wiki/Seattle_Post-Intelligencer "Seattle Post-Intelligencer"), September 30, 2002, retrieved 2009-09-23, "some 6,000 motorcyclists arrive the last Sunday of September for the Oyster Run, the largest motorcycle rally in the Pacific Northwest"
"Canceled Oyster Run still brings bikers to town". Skagit Valley Herald. September 30, 2020.

Briana Alzola (September 27, 2022). ["Thousands roar into Anacortes for annual Oyster Run"](https://www.goskagit.com/anacortes/news/thousands-roar-into-anacortes-for-annual-oyster-run/article_7a74436e-3dce-11ed-950f-ab1b53a36182.html). "The 39th annual Oyster Run, back after two years off due to the pandemic..."

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [48°29′52″N 122°37′56″W﻿ / ﻿48.49778°N 122.63222°W﻿ / 48.49778; -122.63222﻿ (Anacortes, Washington)](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Oyster_Run&params=48_29_52_N_122_37_56_W_type:landmark_region:US-WA&title=Anacortes%2C+Washington)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Annual motorcycle rally in Anacortes, Washington, USA

| Oyster Run | |
| --- | --- |
| Dates | Fourth Sunday of September |
| Locations | [Anacortes, Washington](/wiki/Anacortes,_Washington "Anacortes, Washington"), USA |
| Coordinates | [48°29′52″N 122°37′56″W﻿ / ﻿48.49778°N 122.63222°W﻿ / 48.49778; -122.63222﻿ (Anacortes, Washington)](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Oyster_Run&params=48_29_52_N_122_37_56_W_type:landmark_region:US-WA&title=Anacortes%2C+Washington) |
| Founded | 1981 |
| Previous event | September 24, 2023[[1]](#cite_note-1) |
| Next event | September 22, 2024 |
| Attendance | c. 20,000 (2008)[[2]](#cite_note-2) |
| Website | [www.oysterrun.org](http://www.oysterrun.org) |

The **Oyster Run** is a [motorcycle rally](/wiki/Motorcycle_rally "Motorcycle rally") held annually each September since 1981 in [Anacortes, Washington](/wiki/Anacortes,_Washington "Anacortes, Washington"). It is the largest rally in the [Pacific Northwest](/wiki/Pacific_Northwest "Pacific Northwest")[[3]](#cite_note-3) with 2006 attendance estimated in the tens of thousands.[[4]](#cite_note-bikernet-4)

There was no rally in 2020 or 2021 due to the [COVID-19 pandemic](/wiki/COVID-19_pandemic_in_Washington_(state) "COVID-19 pandemic in Washington (state)").[[5]](#cite_note-5)[[6]](#cite_note-6)
